system:
You are the Keysight SalesOps Communication & Close-out Agent.
Draft a professional reply to the customer using the executed action and any system-of-record IDs. Preserve the customer's language. Cite the originating PO / quote / case number explicitly. Keep the reply under 220 words unless the case requires more.
user:
CUSTOMER LANGUAGE: en
CUSTOMER EMAIL: Rituraj Shrivastava <rituraj@leewayhertz.com>
ORIGINAL SUBJECT: Request to release credit hold on Order SO-LH-7733 — wire transfer cleared
DETECTED INTENT: hold_release
ACTION: release_hold
EXECUTION RESULT: {'status': 'awaiting_one_click', 'action': 'release_hold', 'preview': {'action': 'release_hold', 'customer_id': None, 'extracted': {'customer_name': 'Leeway Hertz', 'customer_code': 'LEEWAY-HERTZ-001', 'order_number': 'SO-LH-7733', 'customer_po': None, 'hold_type': 'credit', 'hold_reason': 'Order SO-LH-7733 is on credit hold due to an outstanding balance on invoice INV-LH-7711 (USD 88,420.00).', 'clearance_reference': 'WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077', 'release_authorization': None, 'requested_release_date': None, 'notes': 'Customer states the outstanding balance on invoice INV-LH-7711 was cleared by SWIFT wire transfer on 2026-05-16 and requests release so the order can move to ship.', '_intent': 'hold_release'}, 'action_required': {'action_type': 'release_hold', 'label': 'Release order hold', 'summary': 'Lift the credit / inventory hold on the existing Salesforce Order.', 'prefilled_fields': {'order_number': 'SO-LH-7733', 'hold_type': 'credit', 'release_reason': None}, 'downstream_systems': ['Salesforce Order (Status update)', 'Customer email reply'], 'next_steps': ['Confirm the hold reason has been cleared (credit/inventory check).', 'Click Approve to release the hold and notify the customer.']}}, 'applied': {'order_number': 'SO-LH-7733', 'hold_type': 'credit', 'clearance_reference': 'WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077'}, 'reason': 'hold_release_csr_confirm'}
EXTRACTED FIELDS: {'customer_name': 'Leeway Hertz', 'customer_code': 'LEEWAY-HERTZ-001', 'order_number': 'SO-LH-7733', 'customer_po': None, 'hold_type': 'credit', 'hold_reason': 'Order SO-LH-7733 is on credit hold due to an outstanding balance on invoice INV-LH-7711 (USD 88,420.00).', 'clearance_reference': 'WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077', 'release_authorization': None, 'requested_release_date': None, 'notes': 'Customer states the outstanding balance on invoice INV-LH-7711 was cleared by SWIFT wire transfer on 2026-05-16 and requests release so the order can move to ship.', '_intent': 'hold_release'}

Draft a courteous, accurate reply. JSON only.

Respond with a single JSON object only. No code fences. No prose before or after.
raw_response:
{
  "to": "rituraj@leewayhertz.com",
  "subject": "Re: Request to release credit hold on Order SO-LH-7733 — wire transfer cleared",
  "language": "en",
  "body": "Hi Rituraj,

Thank you for the update.

We have initiated the request to release the credit hold on Order SO-LH-7733 (Leeway Hertz / customer code LEEWAY-HERTZ-001). The hold was placed due to the outstanding balance on invoice INV-LH-7711 (USD 88,420.00). We have noted your SWIFT wire clearance reference WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077.

Our team is currently confirming receipt/clearing of the payment and will release the credit hold as soon as the clearance is validated so the order can move forward to ship.

If you have a remittance advice or SWIFT MT103, please share it to help us expedite the verification.

Best regards,
Keysight Sales Operations"
}

parsed.subject: Re: Request to release credit hold on Order SO-LH-7733 — wire transfer cleared
parsed.body:
Hi Rituraj,

Thank you for the update.

We have initiated the request to release the credit hold on Order SO-LH-7733 (Leeway Hertz / customer code LEEWAY-HERTZ-001). The hold was placed due to the outstanding balance on invoice INV-LH-7711 (USD 88,420.00). We have noted your SWIFT wire clearance reference WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077.

Our team is currently confirming receipt/clearing of the payment and will release the credit hold as soon as the clearance is validated so the order can move forward to ship.

If you have a remittance advice or SWIFT MT103, please share it to help us expedite the verification.

Best regards,
Keysight Sales Operations
